title: eulophia alta var. pachystelidia
intro: Eulophia alta var. pachystelidia is a variant of the Eulophia alta, a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the roots of Eulophia alta var. pachystelidia are typically used to make decoctions, infusions, or powders that are administered orally or topically for medicinal purposes.
